meaning: 赫西奥德(公元前8世纪,希腊诗人)
examples: The other great poet of the preclassical period was Hesiod.
"As another Greek author, Hesiod, put it," Keep away from the gossip of people.
As another Greek author, Hesiod, put it, "Keep away from the gossip of people."
Hesiod said if you want to have more wealth the only way is to work more hours.
